destinations.evidence: The shared decoder routes 0x080C through the full sovereign-agent codec and returns the decoded executor and TTL.
The codec extracts executor from token 0 and TTL from token 1 after decoding the full 23-field ABI.

equivalence_argument: Sovereign-agent executor/TTL extraction remains a full ABI decode followed by direct field projection, so malformed or truncated payloads fail through the codec before values are returned.
notes: No dependency mapping is needed because the codec lives in the port workspace.
rationale: The test encodes executor `0xCD..` and TTL `55`, then asserts `try_decode_precompile_data` returns those exact values. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: For sovereign-agent (`0x080C`) payloads, `try_decode_precompile_data` uses the full codec and returns the executor address and TTL from the encoded payload.
suggested_falsification_tests: Encode a sovereign-agent payload with randomized executor and TTL and assert decoder output equals the encoded values.
summary: Sovereign-agent decoding returns the encoded executor and TTL.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Encode a sovereign-agent payload with randomized executor and TTL and assert try_decode_precompile_data returns those exact values.
title: Sovereign-agent decode returns executor and TTL
